name: Gum-Gum Giant (Reprint)
effect_text: [Counter] DON!! 2, You may trash 1 card from your hand: If your Leader has the "Straw Hat Crew" type, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, draw 2 cards.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
